tasks.label: git-commit-push-azure-devops
args: ci(azure): agregar scripts de aprovisionamiento y pipeline CI/CD para backend

tasks.label: tmp-step2-create-webapp-and-check-placeholders
args: $repo='c:/Users/DanielVillamizar/Sistema Contable L.A.M.A. Medellin'; Set-Location $repo; $script='scripts/provisionar-backend.ps1'; $content=Get-Content $script -Raw; $user=[regex]::Match($content,'\$SqlUser\s*=\s*"([^"]+)"').Groups[1].Value; $pass=[regex]::Match($content,'\$SqlPassword\s*=\s*"([^"]+)"').Groups[1].Value; Write-Output "STEP2_PLACEHOLDERS SqlUser=$user SqlPassword=$pass"; Write-Output 'STEP2_CREATE_WEBAPP'; az webapp create --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --plan plan-lamamedellin-prod --runtime "DOTNETCORE|8.0" --https-only true -o json 2>&1; Write-Output "CREATE_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; Write-Output 'STEP2_VERIFY_WEBAPP'; az webapp show --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --query "{name:name,location:location,state:state,kind:kind,linuxFxVersion:siteConfig.linuxFxVersion,reserved:reserved}" -o json 2>&1; Write-Output "VERIFY_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; if($user -eq '<SQL_USER>' -or $pass -eq '<SQL_PASSWORD>'){ Write-Output 'STEP2_CONNSTRING_BLOCKED=placeholders_not_replaced' } else { $cs="Server=tcp:lamaregionnorte-sql-a90e.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=LAMAMedellinContable;Persist Security Info=False;User ID=$user;Password=$pass;MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;"; az webapp config connection-string set --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --connection-string-type SQLAzure --settings DefaultConnection="$cs" -o json 2>&1; Write-Output "CONNSTRING_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE" }

tasks.label: tmp-step3-set-gh-secret
args: Set-Location "c:/Users/DanielVillamizar/Sistema Contable L.A.M.A. Medellin"; Write-Output "STEP3_FETCH_PROFILE"; $perfilXml = az webapp deployment list-publishing-profiles --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --xml 2>&1 | Out-String; $fetchExit = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Output "PROFILE_FETCH_EXIT=$fetchExit"; if ($fetchExit -ne 0 -or [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($perfilXml)) { Write-Output "STEP3_ABORT=no_profile"; exit 1 }; Write-Output "PROFILE_LENGTH=$($perfilXml.Length)"; Write-Output "STEP3_SET_SECRET"; gh secret set AZURE_WEBAPP_PUBLISH_PROFILE --body "$perfilXml" 2>&1; Write-Output "SECRET_SET_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"

tasks.label: tmp-step4-trigger-workflow
args: Set-Location -Path 'c:/Users/DanielVillamizar/Sistema Contable L.A.M.A. Medellin'; Write-Output 'STEP4_TRIGGER'; gh workflow run deploy-backend.yml 2>&1; Write-Output "WORKFLOW_RUN_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"

tasks.label: tmp-userreq-deploy-backend-check-trigger
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Write-Output 'STEP1_CHECK_WORKFLOW_FILE'; $p='.github/workflows/deploy-backend.yml'; Write-Output ('FILE=' + $p); Write-Output ('FILE_EXISTS=' + (Test-Path $p)); $m1 = Select-String -Path $p -Pattern 'workflow_dispatch' -SimpleMatch; Write-Output ('HAS_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH=' + [bool]$m1); $m2 = Select-String -Path $p -Pattern 'AZURE_WEBAPP_NAME' -SimpleMatch; Write-Output ('HAS_AZURE_WEBAPP_NAME=' + [bool]$m2); $m3 = Select-String -Path $p -Pattern 'app-lamamedellin-backend-prod' -SimpleMatch; Write-Output ('HAS_TARGET_APP_NAME=' + [bool]$m3); Write-Output 'STEP2_ENSURE_PUSH_MAIN'; git fetch origin; Write-Output ('FETCH_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); $branch = git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; Write-Output ('CURRENT_BRANCH=' + $branch); $localChanges = git status --porcelain -- .github/workflows/deploy-backend.yml; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($localChanges)) { Write-Output 'FILE_LOCAL_CHANGES=none' } else { Write-Output 'FILE_LOCAL_CHANGES=present'; Write-Output $localChanges }; $ahead = git log --oneline origin/main..main -- .github/workflows/deploy-backend.yml; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace(($ahead | Out-String))) { Write-Output 'AHEAD_COMMITS_FOR_FILE=none' } else { Write-Output 'AHEAD_COMMITS_FOR_FILE=present'; $ahead | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } }; $didCommit=$false; if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($localChanges)) { git add .github/workflows/deploy-backend.yml; Write-Output ('GIT_ADD_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); git commit -m 'ci(azure): habilitar workflow_dispatch y apuntar deploy a lamamedellin'; Write-Output ('GIT_COMMIT_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); $didCommit=$true }; $needPush=$didCommit; if (-not $needPush) { if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace(($ahead | Out-String))) { $needPush=$true } }; if ($needPush) { git push origin main; Write-Output ('GIT_PUSH_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE) } else { Write-Output 'GIT_PUSH_SKIPPED=already_synced_for_file' }; Write-Output 'STEP3_TRIGGER_WORKFLOW'; gh workflow run deploy-backend.yml --ref main; Write-Output ('GH_WORKFLOW_RUN_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Write-Output 'STEP4_QUERY_LATEST_RUN'; gh run list --workflow deploy-backend.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,workflowName,url,createdAt; Write-Output ('GH_RUN_LIST_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE)"

tasks.label: tmp-exact-step2-git-commit
args: ci(azure): habilitar workflow_dispatch y apuntar deploy a lamamedellin

tasks.label: tmp-userreq-fix-publish-profile-invalid-appname
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Set-Location "c:\Users\DanielVillamizar\Sistema Contable L.A.M.A. Medellin"; Write-Output 'STEP2_FETCH_PUBLISH_PROFILE_START'; $profilePath = Join-Path $PWD 'scripts\tmp_publish_profile_lamamedellin.xml'; $xml = az webapp deployment list-publishing-profiles --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --xml 2>&1; $azExit = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Output ('STEP2_AZ_EXIT=' + $azExit); if ($azExit -eq 0) { $xml | Out-File -FilePath $profilePath -Encoding utf8; Write-Output ('STEP2_PROFILE_PATH=' + $profilePath); Write-Output ('STEP2_PROFILE_BYTES=' + (Get-Item $profilePath).Length); $line = Get-Content $profilePath -TotalCount 1; Write-Output ('STEP2_PROFILE_LINE1=' + $line) } else { $xml | ForEach-Object { Write-Output ('STEP2_AZ_ERR=' + $_) } }; Write-Output 'STEP3_SET_GH_SECRET_START'; if (Test-Path $profilePath) { Get-Content $profilePath -Raw | gh secret set AZURE_WEBAPP_PUBLISH_PROFILE; Write-Output ('STEP3_GH_SECRET_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE) } else { Write-Output 'STEP3_GH_SECRET_SKIPPED=no_profile_file' }; Write-Output 'STEP4_TRIGGER_WORKFLOW_START'; gh workflow run deploy-backend.yml --ref main; Write-Output ('STEP4_GH_WORKFLOW_RUN_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Write-Output 'STEP5_LATEST_RUN_START'; $runJson = gh run list --workflow deploy-backend.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,createdAt,headBranch,event,displayTitle; $runExit = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Output ('STEP5_GH_RUN_LIST_EXIT=' + $runExit); Write-Output ('STEP5_RUN_JSON=' + $runJson); if ($runExit -eq 0 -and -not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($runJson)) { try { $runs = $runJson | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($runs.Count -gt 0) { $run = $runs[0]; if ($run.status -eq 'completed' -and $run.conclusion -eq 'failure') { Write-Output 'STEP6_FAILED_RUN_FETCH_REASON_START'; gh run view $run.databaseId --log-failed; $logExit = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Output ('STEP6_GH_RUN_VIEW_LOG_FAILED_EXIT=' + $logExit); if ($logExit -ne 0) { Write-Output 'STEP6_LOG_FAILED_UNAVAILABLE_FETCH_SUMMARY'; gh run view $run.databaseId; Write-Output ('STEP6_GH_RUN_VIEW_SUMMARY_EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE) } } else { Write-Output ('STEP6_SKIPPED_STATUS=' + $run.status + ';CONCLUSION=' + $run.conclusion) } } else { Write-Output 'STEP6_SKIPPED_NO_RUNS' } } catch { Write-Output ('STEP6_PARSE_ERROR=' + $_.Exception.Message) } }

tasks.label: tmp-20260227-fix-publish-profile
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Set-Location "c:\Users\DanielVillamizar\Sistema Contable L.A.M.A. Medellin"; $rg='rg-lamaregionnorte-prod'; $app='app-lamamedellin-backend-prod'; $repo='CSA-DanielVillamizar/Sistema-Contable-L.A.M.A.-Medellin'; $workflow='deploy-backend.yml'; $profilePath = Join-Path $PWD 'scripts\tmp_publish_profile_app-lamamedellin-backend-prod.xml'; Write-Output 'STEP1_SHOW_CURRENT_BASIC_AUTH_FLAGS'; Write-Output '$ az resource show --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod/scm --query "{name:name,allow:properties.allow}" -o json'; az resource show --resource-group $rg --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name "$app/scm" --query "{name:name,allow:properties.allow}" -o json; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Write-Output '$ az resource show --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod/ftp --query "{name:name,allow:properties.allow}" -o json'; az resource show --resource-group $rg --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name "$app/ftp" --query "{name:name,allow:properties.allow}" -o json; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Write-Output '$ az webapp config show --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --query "{scmType:scmType,ftpsState:ftpsState,minTlsVersion:minTlsVersion}" -o json'; az webapp config show --name $app --resource-group $rg --query "{scmType:scmType,ftpsState:ftpsState,minTlsVersion:minTlsVersion}" -o json; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Write-Output 'STEP2_ENABLE_REQUIRED_BASIC_AUTH_FOR_PUBLISH_PROFILE_ON_THIS_APP_ONLY'; Write-Output '$ az resource update --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod/scm --set properties.allow=true -o json'; az resource update --resource-group $rg --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name "$app/scm" --set properties.allow=true -o json; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Write-Output '$ az resource show --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod/scm --query "{name:name,allow:properties.allow}" -o json'; az resource show --resource-group $rg --resource-type Microsoft.Web/sites/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies --name "$app/scm" --query "{name:name,allow:properties.allow}" -o json; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Write-Output 'STEP3_RETRIEVE_PUBLISH_PROFILE_XML'; Write-Output '$ az webapp deployment list-publishing-profiles --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --xml'; $xml = az webapp deployment list-publishing-profiles --name $app --resource-group $rg --xml 2>&1; $step3Exit = $LASTEXITCODE; if ($step3Exit -eq 0) { $xml | Out-File -FilePath $profilePath -Encoding utf8; Write-Output ('PROFILE_PATH=' + $profilePath); Write-Output ('PROFILE_BYTES=' + (Get-Item $profilePath).Length); $line = Get-Content $profilePath -TotalCount 1; Write-Output ('PROFILE_LINE1=' + $line) } else { $xml | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } }; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $step3Exit); Write-Output 'STEP4_UPDATE_GITHUB_SECRET_AZURE_WEBAPP_PUBLISH_PROFILE'; Write-Output '$ Get-Content scripts/tmp_publish_profile_app-lamamedellin-backend-prod.xml -Raw | gh secret set AZURE_WEBAPP_PUBLISH_PROFILE --repo CSA-DanielVillamizar/Sistema-Contable-L.A.M.A.-Medellin'; if (Test-Path $profilePath) { Get-Content $profilePath -Raw | gh secret set AZURE_WEBAPP_PUBLISH_PROFILE --repo $repo; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE) } else { Write-Output 'SKIPPED_NO_PROFILE_FILE'; Write-Output 'EXIT=1' }; Write-Output 'STEP5_TRIGGER_WORKFLOW_MAIN'; Write-Output '$ gh workflow run deploy-backend.yml --ref main --repo CSA-DanielVillamizar/Sistema-Contable-L.A.M.A.-Medellin'; gh workflow run $workflow --ref main --repo $repo; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE); Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Write-Output 'STEP6_CHECK_LATEST_WORKFLOW_RUN_STATUS_URL'; Write-Output '$ gh run list --workflow deploy-backend.yml --limit 1 --repo CSA-DanielVillamizar/Sistema-Contable-L.A.M.A.-Medellin --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,createdAt,event,headBranch,workflowName,displayTitle'; gh run list --workflow $workflow --limit 1 --repo $repo --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,createdAt,event,headBranch,workflowName,displayTitle; Write-Output ('EXIT=' + $LASTEXITCODE)

tasks.label: tmp-show-scm-flag-by-id
args: $appId = az webapp show --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --query id -o tsv; az resource show --ids "$appId/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/scm" --query properties.allow -o tsv

tasks.label: tmp-show-ftp-flag-by-id
args: $appId = az webapp show --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --query id -o tsv; az resource show --ids "$appId/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/ftp" --query properties.allow -o tsv

tasks.label: tmp-enable-scm-basic-auth-and-verify
args: $appId = az webapp show --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --query id -o tsv; az resource update --ids "$appId/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/scm" --set properties.allow=true --query properties.allow -o tsv; az resource show --ids "$appId/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/scm" --query properties.allow -o tsv; az resource show --ids "$appId/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/ftp" --query properties.allow -o tsv

tasks.label: tmp-verify-scm-after-enable
args: $appId = az webapp show --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --query id -o tsv; az resource show --ids "$appId/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/scm" --query properties.allow -o tsv

tasks.label: tmp-verify-ftp-after-enable
args: $appId = az webapp show --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --query id -o tsv; az resource show --ids "$appId/basicPublishingCredentialsPolicies/ftp" --query properties.allow -o tsv

tasks.label: tmp-fetch-publish-profile-xml
args: Set-Location "c:/Users/DanielVillamizar/Sistema Contable L.A.M.A. Medellin"; $out='scripts/tmp_publish_profile_app-lamamedellin-backend-prod.xml'; az webapp deployment list-publishing-profiles --name app-lamamedellin-backend-prod --resource-group rg-lamaregionnorte-prod --xml > $out; Write-Output "PROFILE_PATH=$out"; Write-Output "PROFILE_BYTES=$((Get-Item $out).Length)"; Get-Content $out -TotalCount 1
